name: Gishki Natalia
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. During the End Phase of the turn this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: Return it to the hand. When this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Gishki" monster in your Graveyard; return that target to the top of the Deck.
flavor: Cannot be Special Summoned. During the End Phase of the turn this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: Return it to the hand. When this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up: You can target 1 "Gishki" monster in your Graveyard; return that target to the top of the Deck.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the top of the Deck
